\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Declaration of the \doxylink{classSurfaceMesh}{Surface\+Mesh} class and mesh edge struct. 

Holds nodes, triangles, and unique edges of a surface mesh; supports reading/writing meshes (custom .mesh, COMSOL .mphtxt, Gmsh .msh), periodic translations/symmetries, and a few utilities for geometry queries used by RWG-\/based SIE solvers. 

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{SurfaceMesh_8h_source}{Surface\+Mesh.\+h}}.
